name: Roast Chicken W/Garlic
recipeIngredient: 4 lb roasting chicken, separated into cloves
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Wipe the chicken dry with paper towels.
3. Remove all loose fat from inside the cavity.
4. Squeeze lemon juice over the skin and into the cavity of the chicken.
5. Arrange the chicken in a roasting pan.
6. Place garlic cloves around the chicken in the pan.
7. Pour water into the pan.
8. Sprinkle olive oil over the chicken.
9. Roast until the chicken is cooked through (45 minutes to 1 hour), basting frequently.
- Add more water if the garlic seems to be browning too fast once the water has evaporated.
10. Let the chicken rest for at least half an hour at room temperature before carving.
11. Serve the chicken on a platter surrounded by the roasted garlic cloves.
12. The garlic will be soft and sweet-tasting. Peel it and spread like butter onto the pieces of chicken as they are cut for serving.
13. This dish is also good cold.
